message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor teacher
participant "操作界面" as UI
participant "studentcourse" as SC
participant "student" as S
participant "experiment" as E
participant "experimentscore" as ES
participant "scoreitem" as SI

teacher -> UI : 1 选择学期
UI -> SC : 2 查询哪些学生选了老师的课
SC -> S : 3 请求学生列表
S --> SC : 4 返回数据
UI -> E : 5 查询这些课程的实验
E -> ES : 6 查询实验得分
ES -> SI : 7 查询得分
SI --> ES : 8 返回
ES --> E : 9 返回得分
E --> UI : 10 返回得分列表
UI --> teacher : 11 显示数据

@enduml
```
